ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in the format 'HH:MM' */,
  "date_entered" TEXT /* Date the track was entered into the database */,
  "track_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track */,
  "tempo" TEXT /* Tempo of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* List of sub-genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was played on the given date */,
  "streaming_platform" TEXT /* Streaming platform used to play the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, artist) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "publicity" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* User who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the track (1-5) */,
  "rated_date" TEXT /* Date the track was rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the track */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given to the track */,
  "commented_date" TEXT /* Date the track was commented on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist that was followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed the artist */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the artist was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
